text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm working in my office, Sakura
Chiyono O comes barging in.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Here's a lesson for you: "The juiciest
orange is a front runner!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If you eat through a box of oranges too slowly,
they'll all get moldy before you know it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's why you have to eat them while they're ripe
and in season! That goes for enjoying other things
while they're in season too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Anyway, are you free this weekend?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! It's December, and you know what that
means...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Tis the season! The holiday season, to be exact!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Trainer, look! The lights over there are gorgeous!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! There are a bunch of winter sales going on
too! Why don't we go take a peek?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. How could I not be? I want to enjoy this as
much as possible!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...After all, seasons come and go in the blink of an
eye.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If we're only allowed to enjoy certain things at
certain times, then I want to take full advantage
of them while I can.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And if I'm with you, I feel like I can experience the
season in a more grown-up fashion. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't act like you don't know what I'm talking
about! C'mon, take me to a ritzy cafe that kids
can't go to, please?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want to enjoy the holidays somewhere other
than the arcade or shopping mall!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If anything, Chiyono's pleas make her seem more childish, but I agree to look for a place that will suit her wishes.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
M-mayhaps this is s-simply my imagination,
b-b-but wouldn't you say this eatery is a tad, um,
e-extravagant?
choice_data_list: Why are you talking like that?

text_block_list.name: Waitstaff
text_block_list.text: May I take your drink order, miss?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... I'll have a milk tea, p-please...

text_block_list.name: Waitstaff
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'll be right back with your tea. Please enjoy
yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I really feel like I've leveled up in
maturity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Falalala! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh. This song...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I recognize it too. It's a popular song this time of
year.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I hear it all the time, but listening to it here
somehow makes it feel special.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
This is such a special, unknown place to me.
Imagine if a spell had been cast over here to stop
time from flowing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Then this day would last forever. Next year would
never come, and time would just keep repeating
itself.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, that's true. I know better than that.

text_block_list.name: Waitstaff
text_block_list.text:
Here is your milk tea. I'll leave it on the table for
you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: O-oh, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: See? Now my milk tea is here.
choice_data_list:
Some things only happen due to the passage of
time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Like my milk tea arriving?
choice_data_list: Yes. Drink it before it gets cold.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It's sweet, but so light and refreshing.
choice_data_list:
Even that flavor is thanks to the passage of
time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ah... Hehe. Yes, you're right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While listening to the festive music, Sakura
Chiyono O drinks all of her milk tea.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: See? Now my milk tea is here.
choice_data_list:
Some things only happen due to the passage of
time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Like my milk tea arriving?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Brrr! It sure has gotten cold out here.
choice_data_list: Well, it was really warm inside.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: True... Wait!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wow! How beautiful! Look at that! The lights are
different than they were this afternoon...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I must only be able to see them like this
because of the passage of time too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I see... It's stunning...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You're so mature, Trainer. You know so much
more than I do.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I guess I'll keep getting more mature with
time too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
When I think that I might grow to be more like
you, it makes me look forward to it a little.
